import shutil, os, json
d=os.path.expanduser('~/Programming/PseudoCoup_v0/DevComms/hostruns/results')
for name in ('scenario_kt','scenario_kt_faithful_early_finish','scenario_kt_faithful_complete'):
    src='app/build/walks/'+name
    if not os.path.isdir(src):
        print('MISSING', src); continue
    dst=d+'/246_'+name
    shutil.copytree(src, dst, dirs_exist_ok=True)
    pngs=sorted(f for f in os.listdir(dst) if f.endswith('.png'))
    print('==', name, len(pngs), 'screenshots')
    lp=dst+'/scenario_kt_log.json'
    if os.path.exists(lp):
        L=json.load(open(lp))
        steps=L.get('steps',[])
        for s in steps:
            print('step %02d %-28s found=%s route=%s err=%s fatal=%s' % (s.get('step_index',-1), s.get('step_name'), s.get('found'), s.get('route_after'), str(s.get('error'))[:60], ''))
        print('meta:', json.dumps(L.get('meta',{})))
